info.title: CoLD API
info.description:
# CoLD API Documentation
    The Choice of Law Dataverse (CoLD) API provides programmatic access to a curated knowledge base on choice of law in international contracts.

    Core capabilities:
    - Full-text search across all data domains with filtering and sorting by date.
    - Fetch curated details for a specific record by CoLD ID, including first-hop related entries.
    - Retrieve full tables or filtered subsets using user-facing fields (mapping-aware).
    - Site map and landing page helper endpoints for the frontend.

    Authentication:
    - All endpoints (except the root) require a Bearer JWT in the `Authorization` header: `Authorization: Bearer <token>`.

post.description: Searches across multiple domains (Answers, HCCH Answers, Court Decisions, Domestic Instruments, Regional Instruments, International Instruments, Literature, Arbitral Awards, and Arbitral Rules). Filters support user-facing fields like 'tables', 'Jurisdictions', or 'Themes'. You can sort by date and paginate results.

200.description: Search results including pagination and total matches.

post.summary: Fetch a curated record by CoLD ID including relations
post.description: Given a table and a CoLD ID, returns the record with all first-hop relations in a standardized shape.

schema.title: Response Handle Entity Detail Api V1 Search Details Post

post.description: Returns all records from the specified table or a filtered subset. Filters accept user-facing field names and values (mapping-aware).

200.description: Array of transformed records from the requested table.

schema.title: Response Return Full Table Api V1 Search Full Table Post

500.description: Server error while querying the table.

get.description: Returns all specialists associated with a specific jurisdiction using Alpha_3_Code.

200.description: Array of specialists for the given jurisdiction.

schema.title: Response Get Specialists By Jurisdiction Api V1 Search Specialists  Jurisdiction Alpha Code  Get

post.summary: Classify a free-text user query into a predefined category
post.description: Uses an external model to classify the user's query into one of the predefined CoLD categories.

schema.title: Response Classify Query Api V1 Ai Classify Query Post

post.summary: Upload court decision document for initial analysis
post.description: Upload a PDF court decision document. The system will extract text, detect jurisdiction and legal system type, save as draft in database. Returns a stream of SSE events with progress updates and heartbeats.

post.summary: Confirm jurisdiction and run full case analysis
post.description: Confirm or correct the detected jurisdiction and run the full case analysis workflow. Returns a stream of intermediate results as each analysis step completes. Updates the database draft at each step for recoverability.

post.summary: Submit case analysis for moderation approval
post.description: Submit user-edited case analysis data for moderation approval. The data is stored in the submitted_data column and the status is changed to 'pending'. Moderators will review and can approve/reject.

get.description: Returns all case analyses belonging to the authenticated user.

schema.title: Response List My Analyses Api V1 Case Analyzer My Analyses Get

get.description: Fetch draft data to recover the analyzer form state. Returns draft data if status is recoverable (not pending/approved).

schema.title: Response Get All Frontend Urls Api V1 Sitemap Urls Get

get.description: Returns ISO Alpha-3 codes and a has_data flag (1/0) depending on whether non-'No data' answers exist.

200.description: Array of jurisdictions and availability flag.

schema.title: Response Get Jurisdictions Api V1 Landing Page Jurisdictions Get

get.summary: Get all jurisdictions with answer data percentage
get.description: Returns all jurisdictions with their complete data plus the percentage of answers that contain data (not 'no data'). Percentage is calculated per jurisdiction.

200.description: Array of jurisdictions with all fields plus answer_coverage.

schema.title: Response Get Jurisdictions With Answer Coverage Api V1 Statistics Jurisdictions With Answer Percentage Get

get.summary: Count records by jurisdiction for a specific table
get.description: Returns count of rows grouped by jurisdiction for the specified table. Supported tables: Court Decisions, Domestic Instruments, Literature.

parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Optional limit on number of results to return
schema.title: Limit

parameters.description: Optional limit on number of results to return

200.description: Array of jurisdictions with their counts.

schema.title: Response Count By Jurisdiction Api V1 Statistics Count By Jurisdiction Get

post.description: Accepts arbitrary dictionaries from the frontend and stores them in a separate Postgres table.

post.summary: Submit a new Court Decision suggestion
Submit a new Domestic Instrument suggestion
Submit a new Regional Instrument suggestion
Submit a new International Instrument suggestion

get.summary: List pending suggestions for a category
get.description: Requires editor or admin role. Returns list of pending suggestions for moderation.

schema.title: Response List Pending Suggestions Api V1 Suggestions Pending  Category  Get

get.description: Authenticated users can retrieve details for their own submissions. Editors and admins can access any suggestion for moderation.

delete.description: Requires editor or admin role. Permanently deletes a suggestion.

post.description: Requires editor or admin role. Marks a suggestion as approved and processes it for insertion
Requires editor or admin role. Marks a suggestion as rejected.

schema.title: Response List Pending Api V1 Feedback Pending Get

get.description: Simple health check endpoint for the CoLD API root.
